scripts.test:e2e:staging: node scripts/require-release-env.mjs staging && SANDPRO_BASE_URL=$SANDPRO_STAGING_BASE_URL playwright test tests/navigation-filters.spec.js tests/mutating-workflows.spec.js tests/release-workflows.spec.js tests/agent-starter.spec.js
scripts.db:migrate:release: supabase db query --linked -f supabase/release_ready_migration.sql && supabase db query --linked "NOTIFY pgrst, 'reload schema';" && npm run test:schema
scripts.release:preflight: npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:schema && npm run test:auth-redirects && npm run build && npm run test:pwa && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:a11y
scripts.deploy:prod: vercel pull --yes --environment=production && node scripts/require-release-env.mjs prod && npm run release:preflight && vercel deploy --prod --yes && npm run smoke:prod
scripts.evidence:capture: node scripts/require-release-env.mjs prod && SANDPRO_SMOKE_BASE_URL=https://objectivetracker.net playwright test tests/evidence-capture.spec.js
scripts.smoke:prod: node scripts/require-release-env.mjs prod && SANDPRO_SMOKE_BASE_URL=https://objectivetracker.net playwright test tests/prod-smoke.spec.js
scripts.release:verify: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run test:email-env && npm run test:agent-env && npm run test:schema && npm run test:auth-redirects && npm run test:pwa && npm run test:a11y && npm run test:e2e:staging && npm run smoke:prod
